title: Recipe tags rules backfill
summary: 36a/36b/36c 계약을 기반으로 P0 의미 태그 deterministic rule fixture, 기존 레시피 backfill dry-run/report, usage count reconcile maintenance path를 구현한다.
goal: 서버 자동 태그 생성을 의미 있는 P0 semantic/source 태그 중심으로 정교화하고, 기존 레시피를 바로 수정하지 않는 dry-run/reconcile 경로를 제공한다.

owners.claude: stage1 normally; 36d workpack gap reconstructed by Codex because implementation was already requested
owners.codex: stage1 docs fallback, stage2 implementation, verification, ship-pr-loop

notes: Stage 1 docs prepared by Codex because the 36d workpack was missing and the implementation branch needs merged base docs to pass policy. Runtime implementation remains in feature/be-36d-recipe-tags-rules-backfill.
